"Done. I left the product pages open in separate tabs.

| Item | Price | Link | Why it fits |
|---|---:|---|---|
| Milwaukee M12 12V XC High Output 5.0 Ah Battery Pack, model 48-11-2450 | $99.00 | [Home Depot](https://www.homedepot.com/p/Milwaukee-M12-12-Volt-Lithium-Ion-XC-High-Output-5-0-Ah-Battery-Pack-48-11-2450/320268545) | Practical baseline gift, useful if he already has M12 tools. |
| Tecovas The Doc in Scotch Goat | $375 | [Tecovas](https://www.tecovas.com/products/the-doc?color=scotch-goat) | Real leather cowboy boot, neutral enough for casual/outdoorsy outfits, but definitely the premium option. |
| Nike JA 3 Men’s | $145.00 | [Foot Locker](https://www.footlocker.com/product/model/nike-ja-3-mens/449749.html) | Sportier footwear option, but not under $60. Foot Locker men’s JA 3 options I saw were around $125-$145. |
| lululemon Metal Vent Tech Short-Sleeve Shirt | Sale $44-$59, regular $78 | [lululemon](https://shop.lululemon.com/p/men-ss-tops/Metal-Vent-Tech-Short-Sleeve-Shirt-3-MD/_/prod11720682) | Breathable running/training shirt that pairs better with the Nike JA 3 than the Tecovas boot. |
| Old Navy Lightweight Jersey-Knit Joggers | $29.99 | [Old Navy](https://oldnavy.gap.com/browse/product.do?pid=341982052&vid=REGULAR&searchText=men%20jogger) | Affordable comfort reference point, strong ratings, lightweight casual lounge fit. |

My quick take: the battery is the best practical gift, Nike + lululemon is the most realistic casual-athletic pairing, and the Tecovas boot is a much pricier style gift."
